calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Government Code 167; 945.4 - Part 1 Of 4
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Trevor J. Finneman, of Almazan Finneman, Tel. 310.280.6767, for petitioners;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF J L's Petition For Relief From Government Code 945.4 - Part 1 Of 4 is granted. Plaintiff was a minor during the 6-month claims presentation time period and presented an application to file a late claim within a year of when the claim accrued. " [T]he Legislature intends to accord special solicitude to the claims of an injured minor by requiring courts to protect minors from the neglect or ignorance of the adults in charge of their legal claims 'so long as the application is filed with the entity within one year of the accrual of the cause of action,' and so long as there is actually an adult specifically charged with protecting the minors' overall interests above all else." County of Los Angeles v. Superior Court (2001) 91 Cal.App.4th 1303, 1316. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
